name: Bentwood Country Club
description: Bentwood Country Club is a place to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, food, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Brentwood Tennis Courts
description: Porta John for restrooms. 2 tennis nets. One of the has painted Pickleball Lines

name: Brown Park
description: Come play pickleball at Brown Park in San Angelo, TX! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Love Municipal Pool
description: Love Municipal Pool is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Meadowcreek Park
description: Meadowcreek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Next Level Pickleball Courts
description: 3 Outdoor Courts & 2 Indoor Courts. Courts are open to the public during normal business hours however, Memberships are available for discounts & exclusive playing times.
open_play_schedule: Call to Reserve a Court or for more information on Open Free Play Times
fees: Fee required — Open Play Member $5 Non-Member $10

name: San Angelo YMCA
description: San Angelo YMCA is a place to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Santa Rita Park
description: Santa Rita Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The court is free.

name: SMASHERS Pickleball/Bar/Grill
description: SMASHERS Pickleball/Bar/Grill is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in San Angelo, TX. There are 9 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 7 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, trainers or lessons, food, a pro shop or equipment store, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.
